videos.title: SVG Tutorial for Beginners
videos.description: Complete beginner's guide to SVG covering shapes, paths, viewBox, gradients, and how to embed SVGs in HTML.

videos.title: SVG Path: The Most Powerful SVG Element
videos.description: Deep dive into SVG path commands including M, L, C, Q, A, and Z with practical examples.

videos.title: Mastering SVG Animations with CSS and SMIL
videos.description: Learn how to animate SVG elements using CSS animations, transitions, and native SMIL animation elements.

videos.title: Build an SVG Icon System
videos.description: Create a reusable SVG icon system using symbols, sprites, and use elements for scalable web icons.

videos.title: SVG Filter Effects - The Complete Guide
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains SVG filters including blur, drop-shadow, color matrix, and custom filter primitives.

videos.title: Creating Data Visualizations with SVG and JavaScript
videos.description: Build interactive bar charts, line graphs, and donut charts using SVG and vanilla JavaScript.

videos.title: SVG vs Canvas: When to Use Which
videos.description: Comparison of SVG and Canvas technologies with performance benchmarks and use case recommendations.
